meaning: n.杰西(Janet的苏格兰名的昵称)(f.)
examples: Jessie tried to change the bird.
Jessie angrily caught the bird and put it in the fridge.
Jessie cooked a meal for her big family by herself on New Year's Eve.
Jessie Flower, who died in 2011, left the gift to Lord Wandsworth College's foundation charity.
Undeterred I headed to Teesside to see if Jessie Joe Jacobs might be tempted.
